description_long: This object is a soft, rounded doll with a bulbous lower body and a slightly smaller, dome-shaped upper section. The surface appears to be covered in a light, patterned fabric, giving it a plush and cushioned appearance. There are no visible facial features, limbs, or clothing details, suggesting a minimalist or abstract design. The seam between the upper and lower sections is subtly defined, possibly indicating a stitched or joined construction. The overall form is squat and compact, with a gentle, organic curvature throughout. The color is a uniform pale gray, and the texture looks soft and slightly matte.
description: A soft, rounded, pale gray doll with a bulbous lower body and a dome-shaped top, covered in patterned fabric and lacking visible facial or limb features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's rounded, squat shape with a clear seam between the upper and lower sections.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the consistent curvature and the uniformity of the fabric pattern, with no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, maintaining the bulbous form and subtle seam.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, with the same soft, rounded contours and fabric texture.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is covered in a single-piece, light gray patterned fabric that envelops both the upper and lower sections, with no visible separate garments or accessories.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright position with no visible limbs or head, consisting of a rounded lower body and a slightly smaller, dome-shaped upper section.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are visible on the doll.
attribute_hair_style: No hair or hairstyle is present on the doll.
